description: IPO lockup expiration fade tracker. Tracks 220d of US IPOs, computes 180d lockup expiration. Surfaces lockups in next 35d with fade-score (runup + proximity + small-cap). Two-stage trade tickets (T-3 pre-lockup vs T+1 confirmation). Daily 22 UTC.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: IPO lockup expiration scan daily 22 UTC
